## Description
Provide a short description of the change and why it's needed. Link any related issue(s) if applicable.

## Checklist
- [ ] The branch builds locally and the LaTeX document compiles (see `CONTRIBUTING.md`).
- [ ] Figures/tables have been updated and checked.
- [ ] No intermediate/generated LaTeX files are included (see `.gitignore`).
- [ ] Changes are documented where appropriate.

## Reviewer notes
Add any notes for reviewers (what to focus on, known issues, how to reproduce the build locally).
